name: react-native-plugin
description: React Native mobile stack provider for SDLC marketplace. Covers both Expo (managed/dev-client) and bare workflows. Navigation (React Navigation v7 + Expo Router), platform-specific code, native storage (AsyncStorage/MMKV/SecureStore/Keychain), Jest + RTL Native testing with optional Detox/Maestro e2e. Highest frontend priority (300) — wins over react-plugin on RN projects.
